text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, on the way back after a day out with
Smart Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I completely forgot!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have a test coming up! If I don't do something,
I'm totally gonna fail!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need to hurry home and get someone to tutor
me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aw, and after we had so much fun... Sorry,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, when I get back to the academy, I
find Smart Falcon talking to Eishin Flash in the
central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really? You're going to a race?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was just leaving. I'm sorry I can't help you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry for keeping you. Don't worry about
it, and good luck with the race!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Good luck studying for your test.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... If I had just studied when Flash told me to,
I wouldn't be in this situation...
choice_data_list: Can't find anyone to teach you?
Can't find anyone to teach you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh—Trainer! Yeah, pretty much...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nobody has time to help me study today. I'm
doooomed!
choice_data_list: I could teach you if you'd like.
I could teach you if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you sooo much! ♪ You're the most
dependable person on the planet, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It should be fine if we just go over what the test is
going to cover. Or at least that's what I thought...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Groan... This is all basically gibberish to me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: "What part"? Try every part! Urghhhh...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just looking at the textbook makes my head
spin...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aaaargh! There's no tiiiime!
choice_data_list:
Try to take some deep breaths and work on the
fundamentals.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hm... If that's your advice, then I'll trust you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not easy, but we take our time carefully
reviewing past material, focusing on the
fundamentals.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! ☆ I got a much better grade than
usual! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Your teaching style was so thorough and easy to
understand! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! ☆ I'll put on a special performance
just for you to show how grateful I am! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Check out this brand new song: "Patient ☆
Perfect ♪ Professor"!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my trainer's such a whiz! ♪ Even as a teacher,
best in the biz! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's from too much studying, but Smart
Falcon has a strange energy about her...
choice_data_list: I think that's enough—just get some rest!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But I was just about to steal your heart
away with the curtain call!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend a lot of time convincing Smart Falcon to
take it easy for the rest of the day.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah! That way, there's less to study! Right?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna guess my way through all the
multiple choice questions! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! It was close, but I passed the test! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And I owe it all to you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ☆ Thanks a lot! Really! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I just thought of a new song. I'm calling it
"Tests and Guesswork," and I'm dedicating it to
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can picture the dance already! For the "test"
part, I'll hold my head in both hands in
frustration...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then for the "guesswork" part, I'll just give a big
ol' shrug, like, "Here goes nothing!" ☆
choice_data_list: Or you could study, like everybody else.
Or you could study, like everybody else.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I knowww. But studying's haaard...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Trainer, you're starting to sound like Flash.
